steps.t: Landroval can be found at the Eyrie. You should be polite to Landroval.
Landroval can be found at the Eyrie. You should talk to Landroval.
Meneldor can be found at the Eyrie. You should be polite to Meneldor.
Meneldor can be found at the Eyrie. You should talk to Meneldor.
The Eyrie can be reached from the Carrock in the Beorning-lands. You should look out over the Eyrie at the lands below.
Gwaihir the Wind-lord can be found at the Eyrie. You should talk to Gwaihir.
